title: Mizuno's x Waystones
description: Mizuno textures for the Waystones mod.
body:
Adds Mizuno's textures for the waystones of Waystones mod.

![Minecraft character standing in a cherry grove biome, next to a retextured Waystone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6a02c248509042782853f2a2add9bc6297de6b4.png)


Version 1.0 changes only the Waystone textures themselves, I might change that in 1.1!

Please disregard if it says it is incompatible, it should work just fine. If not, feel free to contact me and I'll see what I can do!
